text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, thanks for always
cheering me on, Digital!☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
WAAAH! F-F-F-Falco?! Wh-What have I done
to be blessed with your presence?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I just saw your super cute ribbon
and figured I'd say hi!☆

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
S-Such an honor for this lowly worm!
Thank youuuuu!!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
That's my line! Thanks for always coming
to my shows☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Without you there, there's no way my fans
would get as pumped as they do!♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Seriously, I've wanted to thank you
for a long time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: HIIIAAASDFGHJKL! A-An angel!! Huff, huff… My head… is… spinning…

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Your presence alone is too much for me
to handle… At this rate, I'm going to…
fall in… love.
